title: Data on the occurrence of anisakids in fishery products from wild caught fish in all countries (Jan 2010 – Sept 2023)
author: Thébault, Anne
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This file contains data on anisakids in fishery products from wild-caught fish in all countries, covering studies published between January 2010 and September 2023. The systematic review protocol used to identify and extract the information is available at  https://zenodo.org/records/10270810 . For the period 2010-2020, the records for data extraction come from primary research studies of interest that have been identified in published meta-analyses.
